exercises.title: Crypto Agility Framework
tasks: Create algorithm registry with status tracking
exercises.expectedOutput: Crypto agility framework with policy enforcement
hints: Use abstract base classes for algorithm interfaces
Log all algorithm changes for audit
Warn on deprecated, block on forbidden

exercises.title: Migration Planning Tool
exercises.description: Build a PQC migration planning and tracking tool.
exercises.expectedOutput: Migration planning tool with progress tracking
hints: Include hybrid phase for all systems

exercises.title: Security Margin Calculator
exercises.description: Create a security margin calculator for algorithm selection.
tasks: Calculate needed security bits with erosion
hints: Consider both KEM and signature requirements

exercises.title: Secure Negotiation Protocol
exercises.description: Implement secure algorithm negotiation with downgrade protection.
tasks: Define preference levels (required, preferred, acceptable, rejected)
exercises.expectedOutput: Secure negotiation protocol with downgrade detection
hints: Fail if required algorithms not supported
